center.name: 鄂畢河
center.summary: The Ob (; Russian: Обь) is a major river in Russia.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species breeds in two disjunct regions in the arctic tundra of Russia; the western population along the Ob, Yakutia, and western Siberia
